zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Tibetot於1272年出生在英國哈普爾時，她的父親Robert de Tibetot44歲，母親Eva de Chaworth23歲。她於1290年與John de Mohun IV結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1319年在英國可瓦爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada de Tibetot于1272年出生在英国哈普爾时，她的父亲Robert de Tibetot44岁，母亲Eva de Chaworth23岁。她于1290年与John de Mohun IV结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1319年在英国可瓦爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Tibetot was born in 1272, in Hampshire, England, her father, Robert de Tibetot, was 44 and her mother, Eva de Chaworth, was 23. She married John de Mohun IV in 1290. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1319, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Tibetot est née en 1272, à Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tibetot, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Eva de Chaworth, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mohun IV en 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1319, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada de Tibetot 1272 in Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Tibetot 44 und ihre Mutter Eva de Chaworth 23. Sie hat 1290 John de Mohun IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1319 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Tibetot è nata il nel 1272 nel Hampshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Tibetot, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Eva de Chaworth, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de Mohun IV nel 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1319, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada de Tibetotが1272年にイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Tibetotは44歳，母Eva de Chaworthは23歳であった。1290年にJohn de Mohun IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1319年にイギリスコルンワルで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Tibetot(이)가 1272년 영국 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Tibetot(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva de Chaworth(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1290년 John de Mohun IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 코른월에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Tibetot nasceu em 1272, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Tibetot, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Chaworth, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Mohun IV em 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1319, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Tibetot родилась в 1272 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Tibetot было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Eva de Chaworth, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mohun IV в 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1319 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada de Tibetot nació en 1272, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Tibetot, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Eva de Chaworth, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de Mohun IV en 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1319, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
